title: Insecure Deserialization Attack Detected
description: Detects insecure deserialization attacks where malicious serialized objects are sent to achieve remote code execution. OWASP A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Attack Type' = 'deserialization' or 'Attack Type' = 'insecure_deserialization' or 'Attack Type' = 'object_injection')) or ('OWASP Category' like '*Integrity*') or (('Request Body' like '*rO0AB*' or 'Request Body' like '*java.lang.Runtime*' or 'Request Body' like '*java.lang.ProcessBuilder*' or 'Request Body' like '*ysoserial*' or 'Request Body' like '*ObjectInputStream*' or 'Request Body' like '*__reduce__*' or 'Request Body' like '*pickle.loads*' or 'Request Body' like '*yaml.load*' or 'Request Body' like '*unserialize(*' or 'Request Body' like '*O:4:"User"*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate serialized data in API payloads
